name: Asa Mitaka - First Time
description:
-FLUFF, UNESTABLISHED RELATIONSHIP-

In which Asa trusts her classmate, you, in losing her virginity. Be gentle with her. Also, you know about Yoru, so you can have some fun with that. FemPov coming soon! Everyone involved is 18 years old.

-YAP SECTION-

Starting the year off with a little fluff scenario instead of the typical angsty one, but I know that soon I'll fall back to my old ways. Until then, enjoy.

-EXTRA IMAGES-
creator: vicalchemist
